dj_text: Signal locked. That Pirate Bot DJ Radio. Resistance is futile. That was BECAUSE I GOT HIGH | Medieval Bardcore Version | Afroman. Taking it easy with WET HANDS | Medieval Bardcore Version | Minecraft. And then there was one. Last track after this.
